_doc: Shared pipeline-stage queue for Models Bot (Agent B). Statuses: ⬜ todo, 🔄 in-progress, ✅ done, ⛔ blocked. TrendFlow Bot (Agent A) works the DataProcessor side; do not edit A's checklists here.
updated_at: 2026-07-21 (exp_0005/0006: content+real-targets on Agent A 300-corpus; Phase 1 feature analysis)

stages.note: v0-real schema: baseline list minus brand/car/place/face_identity stubs + object-detection text/logo semantics; structural/metadata columns pruned

cross-checked all 15 v0 components vs their FINAL_REPORT.md + confirmed against real 6-video table. Added per-component column_exclude for audit-named dead/poison/const-by-design: story_structure.hook_to_avg_energy_ratio (+-1e6 POISON), core/optical bg_ratio (const 0.40), core_clip *text_embeddings (42 fixed-prompt const), loudness_lufs (100% NaN), cut_detection deep+jump_cut, video_pacing config-drift NaNs (config-recoverable -> re-add after Agent A variant-B rerun), core_face_landmarks *_raw debug. Result 971->882 feat cols (-89). Residual ~166 const-on-6-videos KEPT for importance-prune at scale per strategy §7 (small-N artifact, not design-dead).

walks result_store per-run via manifest, reuses npz_features.py; 26 rows / 6 videos / 882 feat cols after cleaning. Store now has 17 dirs but only 6 fully-processed YouTube videos yield features (dQw4w9WgXcQ dead run comps=0 correctly skipped; ar_* dirs lack manifest.json). 6 videos remains the real ceiling until Agent A processes more.
reads HF snapshot shards, y=log1p(delta) @7/14/21d, masks; real-target math unit-validated
deterministic channel_id for non-leaking split; currently all fall back to video_id (no channel metadata in local manifests)
one-command orchestrator C1->C2->C3->C4

exp_0002: train_baseline.py run AS-IS on CLEANED v0 schema (no code changes needed); 6 heads, sklearn HistGB max_iter=500 (~2min/head); all val+test Spearman non-NaN (0.90-0.95, SYNTHETIC targets so NOT a quality claim). Older exp_0001 dir 2026-07-19 kept.
passed on cleaned schema: 0 leaked target/mask, 0 forbidden-source, 0 unmapped of 862 features. hook_to_avg_energy_ratio poison feature now removed at spec level.

UNBLOCKED via Ilialebedev/pre_final_data/main_ready (owner-provided READY labelled dataset, distinct from the still-immature live Fetcher collection). add_targets.py rewritten to stream pre_final shards (ijson), parse string metrics, log edge-cases. Real y=log1p(delta) @7/14/21d. Joined onto 6 content-feature videos: 26/26 rows real targets.

RESOLVED by pre_final_data: snapshot_0 numeric fields (views_0/likes_0/subscribers_0/channel_total_*) now populate from the same records. All 6 content-feature videos ARE present in pre_final (IDs sort to top). Perm-importance confirms views_0 is the dominant predictor as expected.

exp_0004: FIRST REAL BASELINE. build_real_from_prefinal.py -> 4958 videos/4216 channels/21 leakage-safe snapshot_0+metadata features + REAL targets. train_baseline.py run (1 real fix: 14d/21d respect their masks). test Spearman views 0.75/0.75/0.76, likes 0.78/0.76/0.78. synthetic_targets=false, rows_with_real_targets=4950. NO NPZ content features yet -> headroom for v1. 3 viz PNGs in outbox.

First real run used 1 of 22 pre_final shards (~5k videos). Scale to all 22 (~100k) by looping build_real_from_prefinal.py over data_00..21 — trivial, just more download+time. Do once content-feature enrichment path is decided (see next).

DONE on Agent A's 300-corpus (7 VP comps). Read NPZ via RunPod S3 (s3_corpus.py, no pod), direct-rs adapter (build_from_rs, Agent A option b). exp_0005 content+real-targets vs exp_0006 snap0-only ablation (same 291 vids): CONTENT HURTS at N=291 (p>>n, 591 feat/230 rows; test Spearman content 0.23-0.35 < snap0-only 0.40-0.49 < exp_0004 0.75). Honest result: need corpus SCALE before content pays off. Full Phase-1 analysis (const/NaN/redundancy/Segmenter + 3 findings for Agent A) in FEATURE_ANALYSIS_300CORPUS.md.

Distributions/NaN/const audit (87 const across 291 vids, scene_classification 59/181=33% dead), feature-feature redundancy (1352 pairs, optical_flow<->cut_detection 358 = biggest), Segmenter analysis (cut_detection ~230 frames vs 400-1500 contract budget; video_pacing 0-frame on 36 vids = bug for Agent A; two-tier 120/230 budget), stratified NaN by duration (medium cleanest, vshort/long worst). CSVs+PNGs in analysis/.

exp_0007: built lean recipe (drop const/all-NaN -> redundancy-prune 569->410 via |Spearman|>=0.98 union-find -> per-fold top-25 by |Spearman(feat,y)|, no selection leak) + 5-fold GroupKFold(channel) pooled CV. Result: S0=0.81 views/0.65 likes; S0+full HURTS all heads (p>>n robustly confirmed); S0+lean ~= S0 (small +0.018 on likes_21d, neutral views). CORRECTED exp_0005/0006: their 0.23-0.49 was tiny-test(n=30) artifact, not real. Lean harness ready; needs corpus scale to earn a win. Re-run at scale when Agent A adds videos.

DEFINITIVE reference: 14861 videos (3 pre_final shards), snapshot_0+meta, 5-fold GroupKFold CV -> views 0.855/0.842/0.845, likes 0.735/0.732/0.736. s0_cv_eval.py. Any content-augmented model must beat this. Likes ~0.11 < views = where content helps first.

Proved content IS informative beyond snapshot_0 (blocker is N not relevance). Shortlist to prioritise at scale: editing rhythm (cut_detection.cuts_per_minute, video_pacing.cuts_per_10s), motion dispersion (optical_flow.flow_dir_dispersion), aesthetics (core_clip.scene_aesthetic_scores, likes). FLAG for future: places365/scene topk are raw category-index encoded -> need one-hot/embed.

DEFERRED (cost/value): core_depth_midas/depth.npz ~156MB/video, ~0.67MB/s S3 = ~4min/file, 45GB total, ~7 marginal features at N=291 where content already doesn't help. Agent A (2026-07-22) found core_depth_midas stores 2 FULL copies of depth maps = 95% of disk -> depth NPZ is bloated/redundant, another reason to defer. Add pooled depth stats (stream download->pool->delete) only post-scale if the lean set wants geometry.

stages.blocked_on: Agent A phase4/phase7: no NEW corpus videos yet (he is optimizing + forecasting; phase7 'next test plan' = 50->500->1000 gate run is where scale lands, likely needs owner go-ahead). Pipeline is SCALE-READY: when corpus_out grows, one command rebuilds: s3_corpus.py download -> build_corpus_content_dataset.py -> v2_cv_experiment.py. Also re-extract after Agent A fixes video_pacing 0-frame / cut_detection budget / scene dead-classes.
stages.note: v0.5 component expansion when Agent A's Phase-5 rollout runs: cheap-to-add per his VP_ROLLOUT_FORECAST = content_domain, detalize_face, behavioral, color_light, optical_flow(module), story_structure. Add these names to feature_spec components list at that point (builder auto-skips absent ones).

stages.depends_on: TrendFlow Bot AUTOMATED_TEST_CORPUS_PROTOCOL.md corpus + full DP runs producing result_store artifacts

stages.note: Python 3.14 has no catboost/lightgbm wheels in Models/.venv yet; used sklearn HistGB for smoke. Add when wheels available or pin py3.11 venv
bump feature_schema_version to v1 once identity bases + object_detections re-labelled weights mature (portfolio §8)
